story.iWant: an event handler that projects Widget events into the widget_view read model
story.soThat: queries can retrieve current Widget state efficiently

tasks.task: Use jOOQ DSLContext for all database operations
Write integration test: dispatch command → verify projection updated
Commit: "Add Widget projection event handler with jOOQ"

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Event handlers for: WidgetCreatedEvent, WidgetUpdatedEvent, WidgetPublishedEvent
Handlers use jOOQ DSLContext to insert/update widget_view table
TrackingEventProcessor configured for projection updates (real-time, <10s lag)
Integration test validates: dispatch command → event published → projection updated
Projection lag measured and meets <10s target
Error handling for projection failures (logged, metrics emitted)

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.section: FR003: jOOQ projections, FR011: Performance - Event lag <10s
doc.snippet: Event handlers project domain events into read models. TrackingEventProcessor with <10s lag target. Error handling with metrics.

doc.title: Decision Architecture
doc.snippet: @EventHandler methods on @Component classes. jOOQ DSLContext for insert/update. TrackingEventProcessor for async projection updates. Error handling with logging and metrics emission.

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: WidgetProjectionEventHandler with @EventHandler methods. jOOQ DSLContext for database operations. TrackingEventProcessor configured (<10s lag). Prometheus metrics for projection tracking.

constraints.constraint: Use jOOQ DSLContext (not JPA/Hibernate) for projections
Error handling must log and emit metrics (then re-throw for retry)
Eventually polling pattern for async projection tests

pattern.name: Event Handler Pattern

standards.asyncPattern: Eventually polling pattern for projection lag

ideas.idea: Test class has @EventHandler methods for all Widget events
Integration test: WidgetCreatedEvent → INSERT into widget_view via jOOQ
Integration test: dispatch CreateWidgetCommand → eventually projection exists (within 10s)
Integration test: dispatch UpdateWidgetCommand → eventually projection updated
Integration test: measure projection lag (time from event to projection)
Integration test: assert projection lag <10 seconds
Test exception is re-thrown for Axon retry mechanism
